end end function Hop()local m=game.PlaceId local J={}local F=""local f=(os.date("\033\042\116")).hour local E=false function TPReturner()local E if F==""then E=(game:GetService("\072\116\116\112\083\101\114\118\105\099\101")):JSONDecode(game:HttpGet("\104\116\116\112\115\058\047\047\103\097\109\101\115\046\114\111\098\108\111\120\046\099\111\109\047\118\049\047\103\097\109\101\115\047"..(m.."\047\115\101\114\118\101\114\115\047\080\117\098\108\105\099\063\115\111\114\116\079\114\100\101\114\061\065\115\099\038\108\105\109\105\116\061\049\048\048")))else E=(game:GetService("\072\116\116\112\083\101\114\118\105\099\101")):JSONDecode(game:HttpGet("\104\116\116\112\115\058\047\047\103\097\109\101\115\046\114\111\098\108\111\120\046\099\111\109\047\118\049\047\103\097\109\101\115\047"..(m..("\047\115\101\114\118\101\114\115\047\080\117\098\108\105\099\063\115\111\114\116\079\114\100\101\114\061\065\115\099\038\108\105\109\105\116\061\049\048\048\038\099\117\114\115\111\114\061"..F))))end local Z=""if E.nextPageCursor and(E.nextPageCursor~="\110\117\108\108"and E.nextPageCursor~=nil)then F=E.nextPageCursor end local R=0 for F,E in pairs(E.data)do local u=true Z=tostring(E.id)if tonumber(E.maxPlayers)>tonumber(E.playing)then for m,F in pairs(J)do if R~=0 then if Z==tostring(F)then u=false end else if tonumber(f)~=tonumber(F)then local m=pcall(function()J={}table.insert(J,f)end)end end R=R+1 end if u==true then table.insert(J,Z)task.wait(.1)pcall(function()task.wait(.05);(game:GetService("\084\101\108\101\112\111\114\116\083\101\114\118\105\099\101")):TeleportToPlaceInstance(m,Z,T)end)task.wait(.1)end end end end function Teleport()while task.wait(.1)do pcall(function()TPReturner()if F~=""then TPReturner()end end)end end Teleport()end function CheckItem(m)for J,F in pairs(L.Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer("\103\101\116\073\110\118\101\110\116\111\114\121"))do if F.Name==m then return F end end end function UpdateIslandESP()for m,J in ipairs(H._WorldOrigin.Locations:GetChildren())do pcall(function()if IslandESP then if J.Name~="\083\101\097"then if not J:FindFirstChild("\078\097\109\101\069\115\112")then local m=Instance.new("\066\105\108\108\098\111\097\114\100\071\117\105",J)m.Name="\078\097\109\101\069\115\112"m.ExtentsOffset=Vector3.new(0,1,0)m.Size=UDim2.new(1,200,1,30)m.Adornee=J m.AlwaysOnTop=true J.Position or(J:GetPivot()).Position)).Magnitude/3).." \068\105\115\116\097\110\099\101"))else J.NameEsp.TextLabel.Text=J.Name..(" end function isnil(m)return m==nil end local function O(m)return math.floor(tonumber(m)+.5)end Number=math.random(1,1000000)local i=W function UpdatePlayerChams()local m=i.LocalPlayer for m,J in ipairs(i:GetChildren())do pcall(function()if not isnil(J.Character)then if ESPPlayer then if not isnil(J.Character.Head)and not J.Character.Head:FindFirstChild("\078\097\109\101\069\115\112"..Number)then local F.TextColor3=Color3.new(0,255,0)else F.TextColor3=Color3.new(255,0,0)end else J.Character.Head["\078\097\109\101\069\115\112"..Number].TextLabel.Text=J.Name..(" \124 pcall(function()(J.Character.Head:FindFirstChild("\078\097\109\101\069\115\112"..Number)):Destroy()end)end end end end)end end function UpdateChestESP()for m,J in task.spawn(function()while task.wait(.5)do pcall(function()if MobESP then for m,J in ipairs(H.Enemies:GetChildren())do if J:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")then if not J:FindFirstChild("\077\111\098\069\097\112")then local m=Instance.new("\066\105\108\108\098\111\097\114\100\071\117\105")local F=Instance.new("\084\101\120\116\076\097\098\101\108")m.Parent=J m.ZIndexBehavior=Enum.ZIndexBehavior.Sibling m.Active=true m.Name="\077\111\098\069\097\112"m.AlwaysOnTop=true m.LightInfluence=1 m.Size=UDim2.new(0,200,0,50)m.StudsOffset=Vector3.new(0,2.5,0)F.Parent=m F.BackgroundColor3=Color3.fromRGB(255,255,255)F.BackgroundTransparency=1 F.Size=UDim2.new(0,200,0,50)F.Font=Enum.Font.GothamBold F.TextColor3=Color3.fromRGB(255,255,255)F.TextSize=35 end local m=T local J=m.Character if J and not J:FindFirstChild("\072\097\115\066\117\115\111")then local m=L.Remotes.CommF_ if m then m:InvokeServer("\066\117\115\111")end end end function UnEquipWeapon(m)if T.Character:FindFirstChild(m)then _G.NotAutoEquip=true task.wait(.5);(T.Character:FindFirstChild(m)).Parent=T.Backpack task.wait(.1)_G.NotAutoEquip=false end end function EquipWeapon(m)if not _G.NotAutoEquip then local J=T.Character and T.Character:FindFirstChild(m)if J then return end if T.Backpack:FindFirstChild(m)then Tool=T.Backpack:FindFirstChild(m)T.Character.Humanoid:EquipTool(Tool)end end end task.spawn(function()pcall(function()while task.wait(.5)do for m,J in ipairs(T.Backpack:GetChildren())do if J:IsA("\084\111\111\108")and J:FindFirstChild("\082\101\109\111\116\101\070\117\110\099\116\105\111\110\083\104\111\111\116")then CurrentEquipGun=J.Name end end end end)end)function LockTween()if _G.LockTween then return end _G.LockTween=true task.wait(.05)local m=T local J=m.Character if J and J:IsDescendantOf(H)then local m=J:WaitForChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")if m then m.CFrame=m.CFrame end end task.wait(.05)if J:FindFirstChild("\066\111\100\121\067\108\105\112")then J.BodyClip:Destroy()end if J:FindFirstChild("\080\097\114\116\084\101\108\101")then J.Block:Destroy()end _G.LockTween=false end function BringMob(m)for J,F in ipairs(WS.Enemies:GetChildren())do if F.Name==m and(F.Parent and(F:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")and(F:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100")and(F.Humanoid.Health>0 and(F.HumanoidRootPart.Position-plr.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude<=350))))then F.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=BringPos F.Humanoid.JumpPower=0 F.Humanoid.WalkSpeed=0 F.HumanoidRootPart.Transparency=1 F.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide=false F.Head.CanCollide=false if F.Humanoid:FindFirstChild("\065\110\105\109\097\116\111\114")then F.Humanoid.Animator:Destroy()end if not F.HumanoidRootPart:FindFirstChild("\076\111\099\107")then local m=Instance.new("\066\111\100\121\086\101\108\111\099\105\116\121")m.Parent=F.HumanoidRootPart m.Name="\076\111\099\107"m.MaxForce=Vector3.new(100000,100000,100000)m.Velocity=Vector3.new(0,0,0)end pcall(sethiddenproperty,plr,"\083\105\109\117\108\097\116\105\111\110\082\097\100\105\117\115",math.huge)F.Humanoid:ChangeState(11)end end end function Tween23(m)if not m then return end local J=T.Character if not J then return end local F=J:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")if not F then return end if J:FindFirstChild("\080\097\114\116\084\101\108\101")then pcall(function()(J:FindFirstChild("\080\097\114\116\084\101\108\101")):Destroy()end)end pcall(function()F.CFrame=m end)end function CancelTween23()if plr.Character.Head:FindFirstChild("\066\111\100\121\086\101\108\111\099\105\116\121")then pcall(function()(plr.Character.Head:FindFirstChild("\066\111\100\121\086\101\108\111\099\105\116\121")):Destroy()end)end if plr.Character:FindFirstChild("\080\097\114\116\084\101\108\101")then pcall(function()(plr.Character:FindFirstChild("\080\097\114\116\084\101\108\101")):Destroy()end)end NoClip=false end function KillMob(m,J)pcall(function()thismob=DetectMob2(m)if thismob:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")and(thismob.Parent and(thismob:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100")and thismob.Humanoid.Health>0))then repeat task.wait(.05)Buso()EquipWeapon()local F=thismob:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")if F then topos(F.CFrame*CFrame.new(0,15,0))end BringPos=thismob.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame BringMob(m)NoClip=true until not thismob.Parent or not thismob:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100")or(thismob:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100")).Health<=0 or not thismob:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")or J()NoClip=false CancelTween23()end end)end task.spawn(function()while task.wait(.25)do pcall(function()local m=T.Character if not m then return end local J=m:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")local F=m:FindFirstChild("\066\108\111\099\107")if F then if not J or m.Humanoid.Health<=0 or(J.Position-F.Position).Magnitude>=100 then F:Destroy()end end end)end end)function enableNoclip()if T.Character and T.Character:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")then if not T.Character.HumanoidRootPart:FindFirstChild("\066\111\100\121\067\108\105\112")then local h1=game:GetService("\080\108\097\121\101\114\115")local O1=game:GetService("\082\117\110\083\101\114\118\105\099\101")local i1 function GetPlayerBoat()local m=h1.LocalPlayer.Character if m and end end return nil end function MoveBoat(m,J,F)local f=GetPlayerBoat()if f and f.PrimaryPart then local E=f.PrimaryPart local Z=E.Position+m*J Z=Vector3.new(Z.X,Z.Y+200,Z.Z)local R=(E.Position-Z).Magnitude local u=TweenInfo.new(R/F,Enum.EasingStyle.Quad,Enum.EasingDirection.Out)local L=CFrame.new(Z)local H=z1:Create(E,u,{CFrame=L})H:Play()end end function StartBoatMovement()if not _G.findVolcanicMagnet then return end i1=O1.Heartbeat:Connect(function()local m=Vector3.new(0,0,1000)local J=500 local F=186 MoveBoat(m,J,F)end)end function StopBoatMovement()if i1 then i1:Disconnect()i1=nil end end task.spawn(function()while task.wait(.05)do if _G.Nocliprock then if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Sit==true then for m,J in pairs((game:GetService("\087\111\114\107\115\112\097\099\101"))._WorldOrigin.Locations:GetChildren())do if F.Name=="\073\115\108\097\110\100 "..m and(F.Position-game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude<min then min=(F.Position-game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude end end for J,F in pairs((game:GetService("\087\111\114\107\115\112\097\099\101"))._WorldOrigin.Locations:GetChildren())do if F.Name=="\073\115\108\097\110\100 "..m and(F.Position-game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude<=min then return F end end end end function getNextIsland()TableIslandsRaid={5,4,3,2;1}for m,J in end end)end)end)task.spawn(function()pcall(function()while task.wait(.1)do if _G.AutoPlayerHunter then end end)CU:Seperator("\065\105\109\098\111\116")_G._AimTarget=nil _G.Aimbot_Gun=_G.Aimbot_Gun or false _G.Aimbot_Skill=_G.Aimbot_Skill or false AimSkillNearest=AimSkillNearest or false _G.AimRange=_G.AimRange or 5000 _G._AimLock=false local function U1(m)pcall(function()local J=workspace.CurrentCamera local F=T.Character and T.Character:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")if not F or not m then return end local f=m.Position+Vector3.new(0,1.5,0)local E=F.Position+Vector3.new(0,1.5,0)local Z=(f-E).Unit J.CFrame=CFrame.new((E-Z*8)+Vector3.new(0,2,0),f)F.CFrame=CFrame.new(F.Position,Vector3.new(f.X,F.Position.Y,f.Z))end)end task.spawn(function()while task.wait(.06)do pcall(function()local m=T.Character if not m then _G._AimTarget=nil return end local J=m:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")if not J then _G._AimTarget=nil return end local F=J.Position local f,E=nil,_G.AimRange if _G.SelectPly and _G.SelectPly~=""then local m=W:FindFirstChild(_G.SelectPly)if m and m.Character then local J=m.Character:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")local F=m.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100")if J and(F and F.Health>0)then f=m end end end if not f then for m,J in ipairs(W:GetPlayers())do if J~=T then local m=J.Character local Z=m and m:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")local R=m and m:FindFirstChildOfClass("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100")if Z and(R and R.Health>0)then local m=(F-Z.Position).Magnitude if m<E then E=m f=J end end end end end _G._AimTarget=f PlayerSelectAimbot=f and f.Name or nil TargetPlayerAim=f and f.Name or nil if(_G.Aimbot_Gun or _G.Aimbot_Skill or AimSkillNearest)and f then local m=f.Character and f.Character:FindFirstChild("\072\117\109\097\110\111\105\100\082\111\111\116\080\097\114\116")if m then U1(m)end end end)end end)CU:Toggle("\065\105\109\098\111\116 \071\117\110",false,function(m)_G.Aimbot_Gun=m end)task.spawn(function()while task.wait(.07)do if _G.Aimbot_Gun then pcall(function()local m=_G._AimTarget if
